subject: Golem — a squat, hunched monster with a white geometric mask-like face and bold orange-red geometric patterning on a black body, from Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles: Echoes of Time
description: A hunched, roughly humanoid creature crouches low in the frame. Its body is predominantly black with bold orange-red diamond and stripe geometric markings. The face is a rounded white ovoid mask-shape with a single large red concentric-circle eye as the dominant feature. The arms are thick and end just short of the ground as the creature rests in a crouching stance. The overall silhouette is squat and wide. The background is a pale cream-pink gradient. The art style is loose and painterly with visible brushwork.
foreground: hunched golem creature with geometric orange-red markings and single red eye
